edges.rationale: Caregivers landing here may not yet understand what the diagnosis means medically; that module provides the clinical framing.
The grief named in the first two weeks deepens; this module picks up where the self-care section here leaves off.
Early-stage caregiving stress can build toward burnout; this module is the next checkpoint.
Advance planning is explicitly deferred — 'month-two task, not week-one' — and this module is where it lands.
Driving comes up in the first two weeks but is deferred here; companion module handles it.
